title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.150 - List of approved glass
text:
307.150.  List of approved glass. — The state highway patrol shall maintain a list of approved types of glass which conform to the requirement of section 307.130 and shall furnish a copy of such list to the director of revenue and thereafter shall keep the director of revenue informed as to any changes in or additions to such list.
(RSMo 1939 § 8392, A.L. 1945 p. 1194)
